value.found_quote: containers.create(...) -> ContainerCreateResponse ... Status of the container (e.g., active, deleted).
value.rationale: The page describes OpenAI's Containers API — a general-purpose container management API for creating, retrieving, listing, and deleting containers, along with managing files within them. However, there is no mention anywhere on the page of "dev-container integration," running an agent "inside a defined dev container," or any concept of a "dev container" as a defined, isolated development runtime specification (e.g., VS Code devcontainer format). The containers described here are OpenAI-managed runtime containers (with memory limits, network policies, expiry settings), not a dev-container integration feature as claimed. The specific claim — that OpenAI offers "Dev-container integration (Run the agent inside a defined dev container / isolated runtime)" — is not substantiated by this page.
